issues.sample: How sad it is that in a recall of a deficient product, that the manufacturer gets to not fix the vehicle if it has more miles on it than they like (see attached, my vehicle is a 2017 with 60K). If a product is deficient, it is deficient, isn't it? Just because I like the vehicle

narrative.headline: What 2017 Can-Am Spyder F3 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (100% of reports).

issues.title: Power Train
